programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. programme.title: E16 - My Octopus Lipoma
programme.desc: Steven's bump is so large, his daughter thinks he is growing a monster on his back. Ethan suffers from an irritating rash in an awkward place on his body.

programme.title: E4 - Martha's Vineyard
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the cuisine of Martha's Vineyard, the island community off the coast of Cape Cod, Massachusetts.

programme.title: E4 - Puzzle Piece Of Cake
programme.desc: The young bakers work together to create two cakes that fit together like a puzzle and decorate each puzzle cake piece to represent their sibling.

programme.title: E4 - Martha's Vineyard
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the cuisine of Martha's Vineyard, the island community off the coast of Cape Cod, Massachusetts.

programme.title: E4 - Stop Ghosting Greens
programme.desc: In a world that thinks green vegetables are gross, tasteless and boring, Zooey Deschanel uncovers the most delicious trends and pinpoints the dream greens.

programme.title: E2 - Buzzworthy Bakes
programme.desc: Zoe Francois' Dad is a beekeeper. So for his birthday, she bakes him a special beehive-shaped cake.

programme.title: E14 - Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: While working on the Chinese railway, Thomas misses his friend Percy, and takes a trip down the memory lane.

programme.title: E40 - Cave Of Crystals, Mexico
programme.desc: Can Glitch be saved from the Cave of Crystals, Mexico before things get too hot to handle?

programme.title: E14 - Top Fun
programme.desc: Preston needs Mojo's racer top speed to get his new plane off the ground. But when his flight goes wrong, Mojo and Bo have to take to the air in Mojo's jet top to help him down!

programme.title: E3 - Cheese Moon
programme.desc: It's a space race as Supertato helps Carrot fly her baguette rocket to be the first Veggie on the Cheese Moon but half way there Evil Pea crashes into them making them crash land.

programme.title: E15 - The Pizza Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels help Duggee try out his new outdoor pizza oven. Duggee makes the bases, then the Squirrels each put on all the toppings they like best. Some of their combinations are... interesting!

programme.title: E17 - The Camping Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are going camping and they hear a scary noise outside the tent!

programme.title: E19 - Mysterious Milkshake
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: E20 - Mystery Seeds
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: E21 - Splash Dash
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: E36 - Backpackers
programme.desc: Mum and Dad are going on an adventure wearing the kids as their cheeky backpacks! Seeing the sights and buying street food, backpacking is a blast - until they lose their passports.

programme.title: E38 - Copycat
programme.desc: Bluey's having fun copying everything Dad says and does, but the game takes a serious turn when Bluey finds a hurt budgie and they have to make an emergency trip to the vet.

programme.title: E39 - The Sleepover
programme.desc: A sleepover with their cousin means Bluey and Bingo get to stay up late! But when Muffin shows up exhausted after missing her nap, the girls get more fun than they bargained for.

programme.title: E14 - Manatees
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to crystal river in Florida, North America, to find out how manatees survive the cold water in winter.

programme.title: E15 - Grey Headed Albatross
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Bird Island in Antarctica to help rescue a grey-headed albatross chick that gets blown off its nest during a storm.

programme.title: E37 - The Decider
programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: The Observers

The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: E5 - Iguana & Coconuts
programme.desc: Daniel helps tackle an alien invasion — green iguanas — in the Florida Keys and learns a down home way to prepare them. He also enjoys some fresh ways to prepare local coconuts.

programme.title: E12 - World Remix
programme.desc: In this special episode, we take you around the world for a look at never-before-seen shenanigans of the BMX duo, and you won’t believe some of the activities that didn’t make the previous episodes. Rooftop and Catfish hatch crocodiles, get maced in a gas chamber, attempt to grow Catfish a few inches, race tuk tuk carts in Thailand, and so much more. They try out a Romanian banya sauna, ride a human run wooden Ferris wheel, try the explosive Columbian game tejo, and last but not least neuter a horse. Enjoy this action packed special of even crazier activities.

programme.title: E2 - Pam and Richard With Jacklyn
programme.desc: Pregnant aircraft engineer Pam is looking to buy the perfect home; her wish list includes a rural setting and a lot of acres; a home off the grid and away from neighbors.

programme.title: E1 - Land Meets Bayou
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: E7 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: E5 - Iguana & Coconuts
programme.desc: Daniel helps tackle an alien invasion — green iguanas — in the Florida Keys and learns a down home way to prepare them. He also enjoys some fresh ways to prepare local coconuts.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Six Australians embark on one of the most thrilling and dangerous training courses Australia has to offer – saltwater crocodile wrangling - and are immediately thrown in at the deep end when an emergency at the farm means they have to help separate two giant males who are up for a blue.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: Renee catches a croc three times her size but Ryan is struggling. John takes Renee and Ryan on an overnight trip where they must share a motel room with crocodiles and the chance to go to Kakadu is on everyone’s mind.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: Scientists from the University of Queensland come to the farm to practice artificial insemination techniques. Lyn tells the other students her heart-breaking secret and says she is considering a future in the crocodile industry. John reveals which two students are going to Kakadu.

programme.title: E160
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.

The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.

programme.title: E390
programme.desc: PHOENIX SUPER DOCTORS: Phoenix Super Doctors is a cross-media health science popularization program. It precisely targets core audiences aged 25-65, including business leaders, middle-class, white-collar workers and highly educated individuals. Centered on trending health topics, the program integrates the wisdom of traditional Chinese medicine with cutting-edge achievements in modern Western medicine. Featuring a top-tier expert team led by academicians, it delivers an immersive, virtual-real blended audiovisual experience through XR virtual scenarios and AI-powered intelligent graphics.

programme.title: E228
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Each episode of My Hong Kong Story features a Hong Kong native, or those who surround their tale here. Interviewees convey their indigenized story in a personnel aspect. With a 15-minute essence per episode, the cinematic language brings a new perspective to observe Hong Kong for Chinese-speaking audience around the world. Everyone can have an indepth understanding of Hong Kong and its people.

E905 - Pups Save A Sand Sculpture Contest
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger tries to cheat at the Adventure Bay sand sculpture contest, his machine goes out-of-control.

programme.title: E214 - The Crew Builds A Pizza Parlor / The Crew Builds An Airport Road
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway needs a lot of pizzas, fast! But when Speed Meister steps in, the pups have to fix his pizza problem. // When a family can't get to the airport in time on Speed Meister's road, Rubble & Crew has to build a new road before takeoff.

programme.title: E101 - Muddy Puddles
programme.desc: It's raining and Peppa is sad because she can't go out to play. When the rain stops, Peppa feels better and she and George get ready to play one of their favorite games - jumping in mud puddles!

programme.title: E102 - Mr Dinosaur Is Lost
programme.desc: George's favourite toy is Mr.Dinosaur. One day Mr.Dinosaur gets stuck up a tree and George thinks he is lost, so Peppa helps George find him.

programme.title: E222 - I'm Not A Barbababy Anymore / Roboxman
programme.desc: No! It's over! Barbidur is no longer a baby, he's a big boy now! // The barbababies are going to the hypermarket for the first time.

programme.title: E606 - Pups And The Stinky Bubble Trouble
programme.desc: What's that smell? A strange odor is chasing the jungle animals away from their homes.

programme.title: E306 - The Crew Builds A Giant Turtle House / The Crew Builds A Giant Volcano
programme.desc: It's Friend Appreciation Day! But when Speed Meister's gift for Mr. McTurtle goes awry, he has to call Rubble & Crew for help. / Rubble & Crew help Lucas make the most awesome Science Fair volcano ever. But will Wingsy get in the way of the eruption?

programme.title: E115 - The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: E109 - The Crew Builds A Drive-In Movie Theater / The Crew Finds A Rainbow Treasur
programme.desc: Mix and Motor's favorite TV star has a new movie playing in Builder Cove, if the pups can build place to watch it! // When Grandpa tells the pups about a secret buried treasure, they find out the key to finding this treasure is construction teamwork!

programme.title: E408 - Mascota Mobile / Kite Festival
programme.desc: Dora is about to give her pets a bath when the pet-washing truck goes haywire, and she has to save pets throughout the rainforest! // Dora and Boots save a mouse in time for him to show off his giant kite at the Rainforest Kite Festival.

programme.title: E518 - Video Game Heroes
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are super excited to play their new video game. But when a video game wizard makes the game come alive, Blaze and AJ must level up and save Axle City from pixel pandemonium

programme.title: E403 - Penguin Peril / Fix It Fair
programme.desc: Kai helps some penguins fly with a remote control, but it falls into Baron Bite's evil claws! // Sir Steel and Blip create chaos at the Fix-It-Fair as they try to fix things that aren't broken.

programme.title: E207 - Don't Go Grandma / Stuck / Rocket Track
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia try to stop Grandma from leaving, so they can spend more time with her / When Terri & Tommy get locked in the Garden Dome, they must put their differences aside to try to escape / Tim tries to help Tia face the new Rocket track ride.

programme.title: E209 - The Crew Builds A Ferris Wheel / The Crew Builds A Farm Animal Yoga Space
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to give Grocer Gabriel the best beach day ever... including a ride on a brand new Ferris wheel at the boardwalk! // When Farmer Zoe's animals need some relaxation, the pups build a perfect place to practice yoga with Coach Karima.

programme.title: E210 - The Crew And Skye Build A Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: Skye visits Rubble & Crew from Adventure Bay when their construction project needs some aerial support. But when Speed Meister tries to beat the pups to finish the job, Skye, Rubble, and the rest of the crew jump into rescue mode to save the day!

programme.title: E912 - Pups Stop The Return Of Humsquatch / Pups Save A Lonely Ghost
programme.desc: When Eddie and Emmy get impatient at the carnival, they hide in Mayor Humdinger's Humsquatch costume to chase everyone out. // Rubble dreams that he meets a ghost and learns that it's not easy to help a ghost make new friends.

programme.title: E225 - Living Together / Holey The Snowman
programme.desc: For the very first time, the Barbababies will take the train and sleep in a hotel. // Barbouille crafted a magnificent snowman that the children named Bobo.

programme.title: E113 - Secrets
programme.desc: Mummy Pig gives Peppa a box, which has to be kept a secret.

programme.title: E320 - Raceday Rescue
programme.desc: It's race day, and Crusher is cheating twice as hard to beat Blaze and Watts - sending both drivers far, far away! But Blaze and Watts are determined to save AJ and Gabby and get back to the race in time to win!

programme.title: E508 - Pups Save A Bookmobile / Pups Save Heady Humdinger
programme.desc: When Ms. Marjorie brings her bookmobile to Everest and the kids of the mountains, Maynard accidentally sets the van rolling and goes off on a wild ride. // Mayor Humdinger has been carving his face into the cliffs of Adventure Bay!

programme.title: E215 - The Crew Builds An Indoor Skydiving Center / The Crew Builds A Roller Rink
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway and Mr. Ducky-Doo want to show their skydiving skills. But when wind gets in the way, the pups help them sky dive on the ground! // When Wheeler and Truffles the pig can't ice skate, the crew finds a construction solution with wheels!

programme.title: E113 - Secrets
programme.desc: Mummy Pig gives Peppa a box, which has to be kept a secret.

programme.title: E518 - Video Game Heroes
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are super excited to play their new video game. But when a video game wizard makes the game come alive, Blaze and AJ must level up and save Axle City from pixel pandemonium

programme.title: E115 - The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: E207 - Don't Go Grandma / Stuck / Rocket Track
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia try to stop Grandma from leaving, so they can spend more time with her / When Terri & Tommy get locked in the Garden Dome, they must put their differences aside to try to escape / Tim tries to help Tia face the new Rocket track ride.

programme.title: E225 - Living Together / Holey The Snowman
programme.desc: For the very first time, the Barbababies will take the train and sleep in a hotel. // Barbouille crafted a magnificent snowman that the children named Bobo.

programme.title: E109 - The Crew Builds A Drive-In Movie Theater / The Crew Finds A Rainbow Treasur
programme.desc: Mix and Motor's favorite TV star has a new movie playing in Builder Cove, if the pups can build place to watch it! // When Grandpa tells the pups about a secret buried treasure, they find out the key to finding this treasure is construction teamwork!

programme.title: E214 - The Crew Builds A Pizza Parlor / The Crew Builds An Airport Road
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway needs a lot of pizzas, fast! But when Speed Meister steps in, the pups have to fix his pizza problem. // When a family can't get to the airport in time on Speed Meister's road, Rubble & Crew has to build a new road before takeoff.

programme.title: E207 - Don't Go Grandma / Stuck / Rocket Track
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia try to stop Grandma from leaving, so they can spend more time with her / When Terri & Tommy get locked in the Garden Dome, they must put their differences aside to try to escape / Tim tries to help Tia face the new Rocket track ride.

programme.title: E215 - The Crew Builds An Indoor Skydiving Center / The Crew Builds A Roller Rink
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway and Mr. Ducky-Doo want to show their skydiving skills. But when wind gets in the way, the pups help them sky dive on the ground! // When Wheeler and Truffles the pig can't ice skate, the crew finds a construction solution with wheels!

programme.title: E114 - Toads and Tiaras
programme.desc: After Lola gets sick and can’t compete in her pageant, Lincoln coaches Lana to take her place.

programme.title: E321 - Curse of the WereDoodle / Gorilla Suit Day
programme.desc: DoodleBob bites SpongeBob, transforming him into a 'WereDoodle'. // SpongeBob dresses up for Gorilla Suit Day and is mistaken for a real gorilla.

programme.title: E108 - Howling Hope
programme.desc: Hope makes lots of noise whilst skateboarding, and her howls are heard around the city causing lots of drama.

programme.title: E601 - Present Danger / Stressed for the Part
programme.desc: Dressed as David Steele, Lincoln is on the hunt for his stolen birthday present before it's destroyed. // After landing a role in a Dairyland production, Luan must hide this news from Mrs. Bernardo, who she beat out.

programme.title: E214 - Jack the Clipper
programme.desc: When a mysterious new barber attacks Swellview with a string of terrible haircuts, it's up to Danger Force to uncover their identity before their own hair gets chopped

programme.title: E102 - #FavoriteShow
programme.desc: Sam and Cat babysit two boys: one who asks a lot of questions, and another who can't stop hugging. The girls also attempt to save their favorite TV show from being cancelled and Sam finds a special way to keep the show alive.

programme.title: E222 - Krabby Patty Creature Feature / Teacher's Pests
programme.desc: A new secret Krabby Patty formula has disastrous results for Bikini Bottom, and only SpongeBob can save the day. // Mr. Krabs and Plankton have to take boating school classes. Thankfully, SpongeBob's there to show them the ropes!

programme.title: E109 - Party Party / Mica's Robot
programme.desc: Thinking she hasn't been invited to Bibi's party Jade sneaks in. // Mica doesn't finish his robot in time for the school science fair, so the Marsupilamis squeeze inside and operate it.

programme.title: E122 - Rocky the Vote / One Star Hotel
programme.desc: It's election day and Bester finds herself running for President of the Book Club against her good friend Rocky. // When Best and Bester accidently list the Sub as a guest house, they receive a visitor who they simply must impress.

programme.title: E102 - Stair Wars / Enemies a la Mode
programme.desc: Patrick and GrandPat try to pass each other on the stairs, leading to a ludicrous conflict. // The members of the Star family each confront their own absurd rivalries.

programme.title: E261 - Hiccup Plague
programme.desc: No one in Bikini Bottom is safe from a case of contagious hiccups.

programme.title: E279 - Welcome to Binary Bottom / You're Going to Pay...Phone / A Skin Wrinkle
programme.desc: In an alternate reality, Bikini Bottom is inhabited entirely by robots. // Mr. Krabs installs a cursed payphone in the Krusty Krab. / GrandPat travels through time to get home.

programme.title: E280 - Abandon Twits / Wallhalla
programme.desc: The Krusty Krew builds a boat for their penny-pinching captain. // SpongeBob discovers a crazed castaway living in his walls.

programme.title: E282 - Arbor Day Disarray
programme.desc: Sandy gives her friends special saltwater trees, but they need more attention than she expected.

programme.title: E503 - The Boss Maybe / Family Bonding
programme.desc: Now the oldest in the house, Leni struggles to follow in Lori's footsteps as the family's babysitter. // Secret agents Lincoln and Clyde investigate the Loud's suspicious new neighbors.

programme.title: E204 - Caught Rubber - Handed / And...Action!
programme.desc: Chuck moves in with the Wylde-Paks after Lil & Jack accidentally destroy his house. They must hide his awful roommate habits from their parents. // Seeking closure on her favorite K-Drama, Lily films her own finale with her family as the cast & crew.

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E714 - Bye Tanya / What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Leni must protect her mannequin friend Tanya when her boss, Ms. Carmichael, decides to update Reininger's. // When Dante buries a secret in The Royal Woods Cemetery, he must stop the Morticians Club from discovering what it is.

programme.title: E713 - Hunn-cut Gems / Can't Lynn Em All
programme.desc: When Liam fills in as a reporter, the school soon falls in love with Liam's life on Hunnicutt Farms. // When Lynn is scouted for her athletic prowess, she soon becomes a professional Wrestler.

programme.title: E402 - The Dated Game / Ice Cream Headache
programme.desc: GrandPat competes for Granny Tentacles' love on a dating game show. // The Ice Cream Man and Ice Cream King team up to capture a mysterious ice cream eating beast.

programme.desc: A hard-hitting look at how the Afghanistan War was sold to the public — and the deception that fueled it for two decades.

programme.title: Toolsidas Junior
programme.desc: Watching his father lose the 1994 Club Snooker Championship, 13-year-old Midi takes on the impossible journey to bring his father's name on the Winner's Board.

programme.title: Pk
programme.desc: An innocent alien lands on Earth but loses his communication device. He meets Jaggu, a heartbroken reporter, and tries to find his device. With time, he raises many thought-provoking questions.

programme.title: E40 - A. Five Short Graybles/Web Weirdos/Hot to the Touch/In Your Footsteps/Hug Wolf
programme.desc: A series of short stories all centered around the five senses, hosted by Pen Ward himself.

programme.title: E3 - B. Feline Fatale/Cat Nippy/Ghost of a Chance/Holed Up/One of a Kind
programme.desc: Toodles hires Tom and Jerry to investigate and protect her against a threat to her tuna can inheritance, but a mysterious figure keeps trying to hurt them as they investigate.

programme.title: E106 - The Vacation/Road Rage
programme.desc: Jim and Bianca set off on an improvised camping trip in the desert. With no real plan for water, Cyril secretly tags along to keep an eye on them – but how long can he stay hidden in the shadows?

programme.title: E130 - The Amadáin/The Burger
programme.desc: Gumball vows to wear a shell and partake in strange Fitzgerald traditions, in order to help Penny get through a tense family birthday party with ease.

programme.title: E412 - Lamput & The Beanstalk/Boss On The Moon
programme.desc: In an accident with the Shrink Gun, a potted plant grows into a giant beanstalk and takes Lamput and the Docs up with it! It's a world inhabited by a giant and Skinny gets trapped!

programme.title: E312 - Human Resources
programme.desc: With Mysterium under attack, Ras, Arin and Sora rely on the Sorceress for help, while Jay leads the Ninja to the Administration on their way to Lee.

programme.title: E249 - Do No Harm/Wheels
programme.desc: Finn makes amends at the Candy Hospital while Jake tries to connect with their unexpected houseguest.

programme.desc: It's a perfect evening. Droopy has finished his day at work and Thief has successfully completed his art heist. But an accident with Lamput causes their briefcases to be swapped.

Built For Billions
programme.desc: ‘Built for Billions' uncovers the blueprints behind the world's biggest tech empires-how they scale, monetize, and dominate markets. From innovative revenue models to dramatic turnarounds, each episode reveals lessons in resilience, leadership and reinvention that power profitability in the digital age.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: The CNBC Debate
programme.desc: The CNBC Debate leverages CNBC's unparalleled reach to the world's most influential people and gets them to debate the most important issues of our time. This panel discussion format brings together heads of state, policy makers and business leaders onto one stage for a discussion like no other.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. programme.title: E9 - Gator Stakes
programme.desc: Midway through gator season, hunters aim to settle old scores. Willie chases a nasty gator called Renegade, who lives up to his name. Ronnie pulls double duty when Timmy arrives with his arm in a sling.

programme.title: E15 - Sinking In
programme.desc: As the team moves closer to retrieving what they believe to be the Chappell Vault, a dangerous event occurs in the Money Pit and the Fellowship must adjust their plans quickly to avoid disaster.

programme.title: E390 - The Diy Delorean
programme.desc: Mike meets a kindred spirit at a defunct Wisconsin railroad town and uncovers vintage treasures. Meanwhile, Robbie becomes obsessed with getting a one-of-a-kind DeLorean knockoff back on the road.

programme.title: E3 - One Very Lost Sea Turtle
programme.desc: Follow the team in healing and releasing a grumpy sea turtle, and then meet a sea lion with an unusual injury that must be taken by crane to the rescue centre. Find out how the vet aids an aging fruit bat and a community rescues a one-eyed seal pup.

programme.title: E4 - Toto, Banksi, and Lucy
programme.desc: Flap around with Banksi the fruit bat and his human surrogate mom, eye a mischievous emu, and celebrate a pig’s rescue-versary. Tour manatee heaven and learn to speak baboon with Dingani, who has a one-of-a-kind kinship with his primate pal Lucy.

programme.title: E1 - Sirga, Loki and Hugger
programme.desc: Walk on the wild side with Sirga the lion, whose human pal, Val, has been by her side since she was an orphaned cub. See Loki the raven entertain his BFF Elliott, cuddle with Hugger the stingray, and see why Trish and Garri the koala are like family.

programme.title: E1 - Baby Sea Otter Finds a Family
programme.desc: Join the vet and his team in saving a massive sea lion caught in a plastic noose, and then visit the Rescue Center, where a harbor seal pup may lose its eyesight and a baby sea otter needs a risky but life-saving surgery.

programme.title: E3 - One Very Lost Sea Turtle
programme.desc: Follow the team in healing and releasing a grumpy sea turtle, and then meet a sea lion with an unusual injury that must be taken by crane to the rescue centre. Find out how the vet aids an aging fruit bat and a community rescues a one-eyed seal pup.

programme.title: E1 - Seasonal Shores
programme.desc: Strap in for a thrilling ride as Lizzie travels by air, land, and sea to meet Alaskan wildlife and visit the world’s remotest corners. Eavesdrop on underwater Arctic residents with scientists, dine with polar bears, and scavenge with bald eagles.

programme.title: E6 - Changing Tides
programme.desc: Bundle up as Lizzie heads north to tag sharks and witness first-hand the slow, sobering disappearance of sea ice. Do time in bear jail with polar bears who are caught raiding a town for food after their icy hunting grounds diminish.

programme.title: E3 - Mexico
programme.desc: The Yucatán Peninsula is home to tourists, sea turtles, and sargassum seaweed. How do the three coexist in harmony? Is it sustainable? Uncover the secrets behind this Mexican beach, including an ancient birthing ritual that takes place each year.

programme.title: E5 - Australia
programme.desc: It’s a UNESCO World Heritage Site, the largest sand island on earth, and home to wild dingoes, six-foot sand-worms, and eucalyptus woodlands. Find out how everything lives happily together in a complex ecosystem built entirely upon sand.

programme.title: E1 - Oceans
programme.desc: Dive to the darkest depths of the sea to uncover the ocean’s most mysterious inhabitants. Journey across vast stretches of open water with humpback whales, then wander down to the ocean floor to witness breathtaking bioluminescence.

programme.desc: Stanley Tucci visits Rome, a city often overlooked in the gastronomic department. He discovers the famous four pastas and explores the city's Jewish history through food.

programme.title: E2 - Baby John Learns to Be Healthy!
programme.desc: Baby John is learning how to be healthy! First, he learns all about mealtime safety, like eating slowly, taking small bites & staying seated. Then, he discovers that even though he doesn't always want to rest, naptime is important to help him feel better when he's cranky. The health lessons continue as he visits the eye doctor for the first time & learns that it's better to use lotion instead of scratching an itchy bug bite.

programme.title: E3 - Baby John is Growing Up!
programme.desc: Being little can be tough, but Baby John is growing up! First, he thinks he's ready to be big & make all his own decisions, but Mom & Dad help him understand that being little is pretty awesome, too! Then, Mom helps Baby John learn how to express all his different emotions & feelings, from grumpy to happy to proud. When Baby John loses his pacifier, the whole family joins in to help him on the big search!

programme.title: E7 - Scoring Goals & Celebrations
programme.desc: Get ready to move and score with JJ and friends! Join a huge family soccer match, then test your speed with the 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes' dance. Afterward, hit the beach for a fun game of Freeze Dance and celebrate your victory!

programme.title: E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for adventure as Arpo's imagination runs wild! After a bump on the head, Arpo is convinced he's a pirate, leading the family on a swashbuckling adventure for treasure. Then, Arpo builds an epic backyard rollercoaster for Daniel, but it's up to Totbot to save the day when it goes out of control! The fantasy continues when Arpo accidentally creates a giant, sentient jelly monster that takes over the entire house & needs to be stopped!

programme.title: E8 - Kick-Off! Football Stars & Teamwork
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for a day of sports and teamwork! Play in a huge soccer match against the parents, learn to never give up when skiing, and help clean up the treehouse with a fun dance party. Working together makes every game a win!

programme.title: E3 - Magic Pets Football Fun!
programme.desc: Join Morphle, Mila, and Jordie as they face off against the Magic Pets in a wild soccer match! With Incra and Telepup using their powers, Team Morphle will have to get creative to win the trophy. It’s a magical, winner-take-all game!

programme.title: E4 - A Fun Day of Games & Construction
programme.desc: Get ready for playground games & construction fun! First, the crew has to build a crazy golf course! After they finish, they decide to try it out, but something goes wrong every time! Then, at the beach, Digley & Dazey challenge each other to a sandcastle competition. They each build castles that get bigger & sillier, & after some bickering, they decide to build one giant castle together! Plus, learn the alphabet & sing 'If You're Happy & You Know It'!

programme.title: E7 - The Titan Games Trials 7
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by Dwayne Johnson. Winners will advance to the ultimate challenge of Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. The male and female competitors who conquer Mt. Olympus will become a Titan, and in the end, the Titans return to battle each other. One woman and one man will be crowned Titan Champions. Dwayne Johnson serves as host and Executive Producer, Liam McHugh and Alex Mendez commentate from the skybox and Cari Champion reports from inside the arena.

programme.desc: Experience marvelous nature that you have never seen before. This program introduces ultimate forms of ‘great nature' including ground, ocean, and natural phenomena of the earth that existed from 4.6 billion years ago.

programme.title: Songs of Our Generation Special: Dreams Come True Completed Edition
programme.desc: A special live performance by DREAMS COME TRUE, broadcast in March to mark the 700th episode of SONGS. This complete edition includes songs that were not broadcast in the original program, along with their biggest hits.

programme.title: Drama Serial 'The Scent Of The Wind' Week 11
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: An Unlikely Pair Hits The Road
programme.desc: Two people who live in ”different worlds” - one physically impaired and unimpaired - and who have never met before, embark on a journey of three days and two nights. Will their world expand? This documentary provides an opportunity to think about diversity.

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: Araki Murashige launches a rebellion. Acting on his own, Kanbei goes to persuade him, only to be taken captive. As rumors spread that Kanbei has betrayed them, Nobunaga orders that Kanbei's son, who is under Nene's care in Nagahama, be put to death. Hanbei proposes a plan to save the child to the hesitant Hideyoshi and Koichiro. But as Hanbei heads to Nagahama, entrusted with carrying out the order, he harbors another plan of his own.

programme.title: E60
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E9 - 演員集體重返校園
programme.desc: 一檔演員搭檔研習進階真人秀，由關錦鵬、吳鎮宇、許鞍華擔當“研習制作人”，參與研習階段任務、監制和拍攝作品，蘇可擔任“研習指導”，陳喬恩、謝娜、李維嘉、吳昕作為“研習助力團”；十多位參與的青年演員，通過共同的生活和訓練，共同開啟尋找搭檔的研習生活。

programme.title: E7 - 伊能靜曾糾結是否公開戀情
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E47
programme.desc: 突破傳統的交友方式，24位單身女生以亮燈和滅燈方式來決定男嘉賓去留，通過「愛之初體驗」、「愛之再判斷」、「愛之終決選」、「男生權利」等決定男女嘉賓的速配成功。

programme.title: Love Unto Wastes
programme.desc: Billie Yuen and her two friends Liao Yu Ping and Zhao Shu Ling who came from Taiwan, share the same ideal to become famous. The three women met Tony Cheung who is the son of a rice wholesaler at a bar. Tony was madly clung to the indifferent dressing Billie and then they cohabit. The four friends spent a good night at Liao's home, celebrating her birthday. One night, when Liao came home late, Zhao was found being murdered. Liao was filled with great sorrow. The three friends received Sergeant Lan's inquiry individually. Liao felt depressed since her best friend conceals everything. Tony accompanied Liao back home, the sight stroke a chord in her heart and Tony tried hard to comfort her, then they had sex. Liao was pregnant, it shocked Billie, whereas Tony felt difficult to choose. Finally both Liao and Billie left Tony and the three noticed the one they love the most is-themselves.

programme.title: The Conman

programme.title: Action Master: Tony Ching: Duel To The Death
programme.desc: The best swordsmen of China and Japan have made it a historical ritual to meet every 10 years for a showdown of fighting skills and powers. The leading fighter of the Japanese ninjas, Hashimoto, and the Chinese chief Ching Wan have come to respect each other after they met, but tradition demands that they lock swords. Their honor is put to the test when rogue ninjas barge into the battlefield...

programme.title: E35
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: The Fatal Raid
programme.desc: Twenty years ago, Inspector Tam Ka Ming, Hei and Special Female Force team Madam, Shirley and a group of commandos started a secret operation to chase a group of gangster across the border of Hong Kong. This led to a large and drawn-out firefight between the police and gangsters, resulting in Shirley and a number of commandos killed in operation. The incident caused Inspector Tam and Madam Fong having a nightmare in these twenty years. Twenty years later, an escort operation bringing Inspector Tam and Madam Fong with four new-generation Special Female Force teammate Alma, Zi Han, Sheila, and Tong Yu to Macau, a group of gangster stormed the operation and they find Hei is still alive...

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 《誰是兇手》講述了一起發生在海舟市的連環兇案，在真相塵封了十七年之後，與這宗懸案有著千絲萬縷聯繫的人們，在各自不可告人的秘密中，一起等待真相浮出水面的故事。 2001年寒冬，海舟市印刷廠家屬院發生了一起命案。新人刑警冷小兵和師兄接到一起報案奔赴現場，卻意外面對海舟市連環殺人案的兇手。冷小兵膽怯不敢開槍，兇手從現場逃走並殺害了師兄李嵐。現場另一名目擊證人是躲在床下的夏木。為繼續留在警隊冷小兵隱瞞了不敢開槍的事，夏木也沒有揭穿他。至此兇手藏匿起來，海舟案懸而未決。十七年後，夏木來到警隊實習，以冷小兵不敢開槍的事作為把柄，要挾他和自己一起查案。而伴随着神秘的心理医生沈雨的出现，一起几乎与十七年前一模一样的案子再次发生，而沈雨身上一个又一个疑团频频出现，凶手究竟是谁？

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 《誰是兇手》講述了一起發生在海舟市的連環兇案，在真相塵封了十七年之後，與這宗懸案有著千絲萬縷聯繫的人們，在各自不可告人的秘密中，一起等待真相浮出水面的故事。 2001年寒冬，海舟市印刷廠家屬院發生了一起命案。新人刑警冷小兵和師兄接到一起報案奔赴現場，卻意外面對海舟市連環殺人案的兇手。冷小兵膽怯不敢開槍，兇手從現場逃走並殺害了師兄李嵐。現場另一名目擊證人是躲在床下的夏木。為繼續留在警隊冷小兵隱瞞了不敢開槍的事，夏木也沒有揭穿他。至此兇手藏匿起來，海舟案懸而未決。十七年後，夏木來到警隊實習，以冷小兵不敢開槍的事作為把柄，要挾他和自己一起查案。而伴随着神秘的心理医生沈雨的出现，一起几乎与十七年前一模一样的案子再次发生，而沈雨身上一个又一个疑团频频出现，凶手究竟是谁？

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 盛唐初年，氣象萬千；夜魅長安，業孽浮屠。光怪陸離之下盡是怪異之事，血雨腥風間暗藏獵殺危局。盛世奇譚，詭案揭幕。
